ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "race" TEXT /* The political race associated with the poll */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year the poll was conducted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the poll */,
  "pollster" TEXT /* The organization or individual that conducted the poll */,
  "partisan" TEXT /* Partisan leanings of the pollster */,
  "polldate" TEXT /* The date the poll was conducted */,
  "samplesize" INTEGER /* The number of individuals surveyed */,
  "type_simple" TEXT /* The simple type of poll */,
  "type_detail" TEXT /* The detailed type of poll */,
  "electiondate" TEXT /* The date of the actual election */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the poll */,
  "poll_source" TEXT /* Source of the poll data */,
  "poll_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for conducting the poll */,
  "poll_funding" TEXT /* Funding source for the poll */,
  "poll_weighting" TEXT /* Description of the weighting method used to adjust the poll results */,
  "poll_confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the poll results */,
  "poll_margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the poll results */,
  "poll_sample_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic breakdown of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Key points of the candidate's political platform */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_candidates" (
  "poll_candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a poll and a candidate */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "predicted_percentage" REAL /* Predicted percentage of votes for the candidate */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the predicted percentage */,
  "prediction_interval" TEXT /* Prediction interval for the predicted percentage */,
  "poll_source_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence in the poll source for the candidate's prediction */,
  "poll_sample_size_candidate" INTEGER /* Sample size specific to the candidate's prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_candidates_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_candidates_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll associated with the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "actual_percentage" REAL /* Actual percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  "margin" REAL /* Margin of victory or defeat for the candidate */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage for the election */,
  "electoral_votes" INTEGER /* Number of electoral votes (if applicable) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the results were validated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the election results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the poll analysis */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "error" REAL /* Margin of error in the poll predictions */,
  "bias" REAL /* Bias in the poll predictions */,
  "rightcall" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the poll prediction was accurate (1 for right call, 0 for wrong call) */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the overall accuracy of the poll */,
  "bias_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the bias */,
  "bias_source" TEXT /* Source of the bias */,
  "trend_analysis" TEXT /* Analysis of trends over time for the poll */,
  "historical_comparison" TEXT /* Comparison with historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_analysis_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., strategist, campaign manager, public user) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the poll */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the poll was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the access activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
